creator: niedbalski@gmail.com
text:
The supertabular bundle defines the supertabular and
supertabular* environments. They make it possible to have a tabular
that spans multiple pages. Each page is its own tabular environment,
thus the various parts may have different widths.


WWW:http://www.ctan.org/tex-archive/macros/latex/contrib/supertabular/

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
